'''Cet Willak''' was an [[Alliance Special Operations/Legends|Alliance Special Operations]] [[Major/Legends|Major]] assigned as an [[Alliance observer]] aboard the ''[[Far Orbit]]'' in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]].<ref name="FOP" />

Willak was none too pleased to be the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] watchdog amongst those whom he saw as "cutthroats, [[Thief/Legends|thieves]], murderers, and [[Vervikk/Legends|space-rats]]." He hoped to be reassigned to another duty, preferably with more "action". Willak unfortunately was not a skilled [[Diplomat/Legends|diplomat]], and [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Dhas Fenoep Vedij|Vedij]] had to intervene to keep the peace between the Alliance SpecOps officer and his crew. Willak's arrogance and abrasiveness, however, did not conceal ineptitude. He was a skilled tactical, strategic and logistics coordinator.<ref name="FOP" />
